---
title: "TajimasD_pi"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-12-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap')) 
```

#plotting TajimasD

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsignif)

#OUTDIR <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/tajimasD/"

# read
w <- read_tsv(("data/2.TajimasD_PI/wild_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)
l <- read_tsv(("data/2.TajimasD_PI/land_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)
i <- read_tsv(("data/2.TajimasD_PI/imp_labeled_tajD.txt"),
              col_names=c("chr","start","end","TajimaD","class","pop"),
              col_types=colspec)
# column specifications
colspec <- cols(
  chr = col_character(),
  start = col_integer(),
  end = col_integer(),
  TajimaD = col_double(),
  class = col_character(),
  pop = col_character()
)

dat <- bind_rows(w,l,i) %>%
  filter(is.finite(TajimaD)) %>%
  mutate(
    class = factor(class, levels = c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    # order populations
    pop   = factor(pop,   levels = c("Wild","Landrace","Improved"))
  )

# medians for labels
meds <- dat %>%
  group_by(pop, class) %>%
  summarise(med = median(TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# same y limits for all facets
ymax <- max(dat$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE)
ystar <- ymax * 0.95  # where to draw the significance bracket
ylims <- c(min(dat$TajimaD, na.rm = TRUE), ymax * 1.05)

stats <- dat %>%
  group_by(pop) %>%
  summarise(
    n_peak   = sum(class=="PEAK"),
    n_bg     = sum(class=="BACKGROUND"),
    med_peak = median(TajimaD[class=="PEAK"], na.rm=TRUE),
    med_bg   = median(TajimaD[class=="BACKGROUND"], na.rm=TRUE),
    p_wilcox = wilcox.test(TajimaD[class=="PEAK"], TajimaD[class=="BACKGROUND"])$p.value,
    .groups  = "drop"
  )
stats


p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = class, y = TajimaD, fill = class)) +
  geom_violin(width = 0.9, trim = TRUE, color = "black", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.12, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black") +
  # median text
  geom_text(data = meds,
            aes(x = class, y = med, label = sprintf("%.2f", med)),
            vjust = -0.8, size = 3, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  # significance stars (Wilcoxon) for each facet
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    test = "wilcox.test",
    map_signif_level = TRUE,
    y_position = ystar,
    tip_length = 0.01
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ pop, nrow = 1, scales = "fixed") +  # same y across panels
  coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(BACKGROUND = "grey75", PEAK = "#ffb000")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Tajima's D", title = "") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("graphs/01_publication/2.bal_pos_taj_pi/tajD_violin.png", p, width = 11, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
```{r}
library(ggsignif)  
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
#getwd()
#"/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/pi/plot"

read_pi <- function(path){
  # chr start end pi n_vars SET POP
  read_tsv(path, col_names = c("chr","start","end","pi","n_vars","SET","POP"), show_col_types = FALSE)
}
pi_all <- bind_rows(
  read_pi("data/2.TajimasD_PI/wild_labeled_pi_withN.txt"),
  read_pi("data/2.TajimasD_PI/land_labeled_pi_withN.txt"),
  read_pi("data/2.TajimasD_PI/imp_labeled_pi_withN.txt")
) %>% filter(is.finite(pi)) %>%
  mutate(SET=factor(SET, levels=c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
         POP=factor(POP, levels=c("Improved","Landrace","Wild")))

meds_pi <- pi_all %>% group_by(POP, SET) %>% summarise(med=median(pi), .groups="drop")
stats_pi <- pi_all %>%
  group_by(POP) %>%
  summarise(
    n_peak   = sum(SET == "PEAK"),
    n_bg     = sum(SET == "BACKGROUND"),
    med_peak = median(pi[SET == "PEAK"], na.rm = TRUE),
    med_bg   = median(pi[SET == "BACKGROUND"], na.rm = TRUE),
    p_wilcox = wilcox.test(pi[SET == "PEAK"],
                           pi[SET == "BACKGROUND"])$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
stats_pi
pi_all$POP <- factor(pi_all$POP, levels = c("Wild", "Landrace", "Improved"))
# medians computed as meds_pi
p_pi <- ggplot(pi_all, aes(SET, pi, fill=SET)) +
  geom_violin(trim=TRUE, width=.9, alpha=.9, color="black") +
  geom_boxplot(width=.15, outlier.shape=NA, color="black") +
  geom_text(data=meds_pi, aes(SET, med, label=sprintf("%.3g", med)),
            vjust=-0.8, size=3, fontface="bold", inherit.aes=FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~POP, nrow=1, scales="fixed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c(BACKGROUND="grey75", PEAK="#f7a600")) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="Nucleotide diversity (π)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(
    legend.position="none",
    strip.text=element_text(face="bold", size=16),
    axis.text.x=element_text(face="bold")
  ) +
  geom_signif(
    comparisons=list(c("BACKGROUND","PEAK")),
    map_signif_level=TRUE,
    test="wilcox.test",
    step_increase=0.1
  )
p_pi
ggsave("graphs/01_publication/2.bal_pos_taj_pi/pi_violin_signif.png", p_pi, width=11, height=4, dpi=600)
```
